# Script Generation Guidelines

When generating a GMAT script, follow these rules exactly.

## Script structure

```
%General Mission Analysis Tool(GMAT) Script
%Generated by Mission Agent

%---------- Spacecraft
Create Spacecraft SC;
GMAT SC.DateFormat = UTCGregorian;
GMAT SC.Epoch = '01 Jan 2024 00:00:00.000';
GMAT SC.CoordinateSystem = EarthMJ2000Eq;
GMAT SC.DisplayStateType = Keplerian;
GMAT SC.SMA = <value>;       % km — semi-major axis
GMAT SC.ECC = <value>;       % 0 to 0.999
GMAT SC.INC = <value>;       % degrees
GMAT SC.RAAN = <value>;
GMAT SC.AOP  = <value>;
GMAT SC.TA   = <value>;
GMAT SC.DryMass = <value>;   % kg
GMAT SC.Cd = 2.2;
GMAT SC.Cr = 1.8;
GMAT SC.DragArea = <value>;  % m²
GMAT SC.SRPArea  = <value>;  % m²
```

## Parameter rules

| Parameter | Valid range | Notes |
|-----------|------------|-------|
| SMA | 6571–500000 km | altitude = SMA − 6371 km |
| ECC | 0–0.999 | circular: 0.001 |
| INC | 0–180° | SSO ≈ 97–99° at 400–800 km |
| Duration (ElapsedDays) | 0.01–3650 | default: 1.0 |

## Sun-synchronous inclination formula

```python
import math
h_km = <altitude>
a = 6371 + h_km
n = math.sqrt(398600.4418 / a**3)  # mean motion
J2 = 1.08263e-3
Re = 6371.0
# Nodal precession must equal 360°/365.25 days = 0.9856°/day
precession_rad_per_s = math.radians(0.9856 / 86400)
cos_inc = precession_rad_per_s * (2 * a**2) / (-3 * n * J2 * Re**2)
inc_deg = math.degrees(math.acos(cos_inc))
```

## Force model choices

- Default: GravityField Degree/Order 10, JacchiaRoberts drag, Luna + Sun point masses, SRP On
- Lifetime analysis: use MSISE90 atmosphere, F10.7=150, AP=3
- Maneuver planning (no drag): set `FM.Drag = None`, `FM.SRP = Off`

## Report file conventions

Always include `ephemeris.txt` with ECI position/velocity. Use exact column names shown in templates.

## Common mistakes to avoid

- SMA not altitude — convert: SMA = altitude + 6371
- Epoch format must be exactly: `'DD Mon YYYY HH:MM:SS.mmm'`
- Collection syntax: `{Earth}` not `Earth` for PrimaryBodies
- ForceModel name must match Propagator.FM exactly
- Report `Filename` paths are rewritten by the runner — use relative names like `'ephemeris.txt'`
